description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring clean white exterior walls and large rectangular windows. The front yard includes a manicured hedge, a small lawn, and a single tree, while the backyard boasts a swimming pool, patio furniture, and an outdoor dining area. The house has an open-plan layout visible through the windows, with contemporary furnishings and spacious rooms. The main entrance is marked by a simple door with a small overhang and is flanked by greenery. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large picture windows and others smaller and more functional. The overall aesthetic is sleek and functional, emphasizing open space and outdoor living.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, a front garden, and a backyard pool and patio area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, manicured hedge, small lawn, and a tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the house's solid white wall, a glimpse of the interior, and the pool area in the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, outdoor dining set, and large windows opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage door, side garden, and a partial view of the pool and tree.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a small overhang, flanked by hedges and a tree, no porch or columns
